title: The Lean Startup
author: Eric Ries
description: How today's entrepreneurs use continuous innovation to create radically successful businesses. 5 lean methodology skills.
longDescription: Eric Ries's groundbreaking methodology applies scientific experimentation to the process of building a business. Instead of spending months perfecting a product no one wants, lean startups build minimum viable products, measure real customer behavior, and learn whether to pivot or persevere. These skills teach you to apply validated learning, innovation accounting, and rapid iteration to any new venture or product initiative.
